name: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month, manual report generation causes delays in client billing. We automate expense report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month
problem_solved: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and prone to errors.
features: manual entry of credit card transactions

locked_fields.primary_user: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month, manual report generation causes delays in client billing. We automate expense report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements
must_have_features: manual entry of credit card transactions

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card statements/month, manual report generation causes delays in client billing. We automate expense report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
